overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a covered cyberpunk market street with neon signage. The camera moves past various NPCs, circles a food stall with green seating, and settles behind the counter looking out at the bustling market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market walkway with neon signage

events.description: camera moves past the initially followed character in white pants
approaching the food stall area with green seating

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market passage, navigating between pedestrians and stalls

notable_agents.action: character in white pants and black top walking ahead of camera
character standing near the food stall entrance

entered.detail: large overhead structure with metal beams and corrugated roofing
glowing green chevron arrow sign mounted on building facade
orange fabric awning extending over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk market walkway with neon signage overhead. The camera follows a character in white pants through a moderately crowded pedestrian area, passing various market stalls. The concrete walkway is littered with newspapers and debris. The camera moves past the initial character and approaches a food stall with green seating visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall area with green bar stools and service counter

events.description: camera begins to circle around the right side of the food stall
moving from the front customer area to the side of the food stall

agents.ego_description: circling around the food stall, observing the green-haired character seated at the counter

notable_agents.action: green-haired character with blue backpack sitting at the food stall counter
character in dark clothing walking past the stall front

entered.detail: bright green bar stools arranged along the food stall counter
metal service counter with menu displays and food preparation area

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and circles the food stall with distinctive green bar stools. A character with green hair sits at the counter facing the walkway. The camera moves along the right side of the stall, revealing the service counter and cooking equipment. Other pedestrians walk past in the background while the covered market structure recedes to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: behind the counter service area of the food stall

events.description: moving into the back service area behind the food stall counter
entering darker interior space with artificial fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: moving behind the food stall counter into the service area, passing shelves of bottles and equipment

entered.detail: shelving units with various bottles and supplies against the wall
metal tray with glass bottles and bar tools on the service counter
tall refrigerator with glass door containing beverages
small red plastic stool near the back wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the narrow service area behind the food stall counter. The space contains bar shelves with bottles, a refrigerator unit, and various cooking equipment. The lighting shifts to artificial fluorescent tubes overhead. The green stools are now out of view as the camera navigates the confined back area of the stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: behind the counter looking out at the market street

events.description: camera comes to a complete stop behind the counter, settling into a static view
pedestrians walk past the stall opening in the background

agents.ego_description: stationary behind the counter observing the market street and the green-haired customer sitting at the bar

notable_agents.action: green-haired character sitting at the counter with back to camera, facing the market street
various pedestrians walking through the market in the background

entered.detail: open view of the bustling market street with overhead pipes and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera remains static behind the food stall counter, looking out at the market street. The green-haired customer sits at the counter with their back to the camera, occasionally moving. The view shows the bustling market area with pedestrians walking past, overhead industrial pipes, and glowing neon signs in the distance. Bottles and glasses sit on the counter in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling cyberpunk market that transitions from a wide pedestrian walkway into the confined service area of a food stall. It begins by following a character in white pants through a covered street littered with debris, moving past various stalls under glowing neon signage. As the camera approaches a food stall, it circles around the distinctive green bar stools and a green-haired customer to reveal the service counter and cooking equipment. The scene then shifts into the narrow back area of the stall, where the lighting changes to artificial fluorescent tubes amidst shelves of bottles and refrigerators. Finally, the camera settles into a static position behind the counter, looking out past glasses and bottles toward the crowded market street and industrial pipes in the distance.
